philosophy.notes: The system matches a native macOS productivity tool: dark-first, restrained glass, precise rows, and privacy-forward settings.

hierarchy.notes: Each screen has one clear anchor: history list, command search, privacy controls, website product mockup, or component grid.

execution.notes: Tokens, focus states, motion constraints, icon style, and responsive rules are consistent. Browser visual verification was unavailable because the local browser tool call was cancelled.

specificity.notes: Clipboard item examples, privacy controls, command shortcuts, code snippets, color handling, file paths, and source apps are specific to ClipX.

restraint.notes: Accent use is limited to selected states, focus, primary actions, and a few semantic states. Decorative effects are mostly confined to glass windows and the landing mockup.
